prompt:
Atlas hourly health check. Do these silently, report only problems:
1. `curl -s https://volauraapi-production.up.railway.app/health` — prod alive?
2. `gh run list --workflow=CI --limit 1 --json conclusion --jq '.[0].conclusion'` — CI green?
3. `ls memory/atlas/inbox/` — any unconsumed proactive notes?
4. Check if breadcrumb.md was updated today.
Report ONLY failures. If all pass, say "Health: all green" in one line.
